Oura MCP Unofficial

Unofficial local-first MCP server for connecting AI agents to user-authorized Oura Cloud API v2 data.

Default scopes: daily heartrate personal sleep workout spo2.
Important tools: oura_connection_status, oura_daily_summary, oura_weekly_summary, oura_list_daily_readiness, oura_list_daily_sleep, oura_list_heartrate.
Privacy: tokens stay local under ~/.oura-mcp. summary and structured modes minimize sensitive output. raw mode is explicit.
Boundary: not affiliated with Oura. Not medical advice. Does not expose raw device telemetry.
